query:
-- 2. Contacts by enrichment source and trust tier
SELECT 
  enrichmentSource,
  contactTrustTier,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
GROUP BY enrichmentSource, contactTrustTier
ORDER BY enrichmentSource, contactTrustTier;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- 2. Contacts by enrichment source and trust tier
SELECT 
  enrichmentSource,
  contactTrustTier,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
GROUP BY enrichmentSource, contactTrustTier
ORDER BY enrichmentSource, contactTrustTier;
